title: praravinia panayensis
intro: Praravinia panayensis, also known as the Philippine Praravinia or Panay Praravinia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae native to the Philippines. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Praravinia panayensis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Praravinia panayensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
